name: Tag Master Bot
description: Powerful Telegram tagging bot with 8 tag types, flood protection, and admin controls.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from https://my.telegram.org

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram user ID (get it from @userinfobot)

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection string (get free cluster at cloud.mongodb.com). Format: mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster.mongodb.net

UPDATES_CHANNEL.description: Link to your Telegram updates channel (e.g. https://t.me/mychannel)

BOT_USERNAME.description: Your bot's username WITHOUT the @ symbol

TAG_DELAY.description: Seconds to wait between each individual tag message (default: 1.5)

BATCH_DELAY.description: Seconds to wait between each 6-user batch (default: 3.0)

USERS_PER_MSG.description: Mentions per message for /all and /admin tags (default: 6)
